title: Robot Disassembly Simulator
physics_constraints: 5 parts: head, torso, leftArm, rightArm, legs
assemble animation ~1s back to original positions
raycaster click to select parts in exploded view
difficulty_analysis: L4: GLTFLoader model loading and grouping into 5 main parts, bidirectional disassemble/assemble exploded-view animation, Raycaster part selection and highlight, info panel sync, animation state management and progress tracking.
